title: Overview grouping and agent collector logging
description: Update the dashboard overview so administrators can see approved agents grouped by their assigned groups with a group filter, and fix agent logging so the log file receives live output and collectors emit useful trace/debug logs.
acceptance_criteria: The overview page groups approved agents under group-name section rows.
The overview page provides a group filter, including all groups and ungrouped agents.
Agents with no metrics are still visible in the overview as no-data rows.
Agent log files receive log entries while the process is running.
Each collector logs start/result information when it updates metrics.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Add overview grouping behavior
tasks.description: Add dashboard grouping/filtering helpers and render grouped overview sections by real group assignment.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard grouping handles single-group, multi-group, and ungrouped agents.
Filtering by a group only shows agents in that group.

unit: Extend dashboard/src/status.test.ts with GIVEN/WHEN/THEN tests for grouping agents by GroupRecord and filtering by group.

tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented groupOverviewAgents in dashboard/src/status.ts, added Overview filter state/rendering in dashboard/src/main.tsx, and styled the filter and section rows in dashboard/src/styles.css.

tasks.title: Make agent logging visible while running
tasks.description: Ensure SingleLog flushes file output after entries so foreground/service agent logs are not empty while the agent is active.
acceptance_criteria: A log entry written through SingleLog can be read from the configured file while the process remains alive.

unit: Add common_tests/singlelog_test.cpp proving an INFO line reaches the configured log file without process teardown.

tasks.implementation_notes: Updated common/SingleLog.hpp to flush file output after each dequeued entry. Added common_tests/singlelog_test.cpp to verify a log entry can be read while the process remains alive.

tasks.title: Add collector-level logging
tasks.description: Add concise trace/debug/warning logging to each collector update path.
acceptance_criteria: CPU, memory, disk, network, temperature, and process collectors log update activity and notable unavailable-source conditions.

unit: Run existing collector contract test to ensure collector behavior remains intact.

tasks.implementation_notes: Added LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE and concise trace/debug summaries to CPU, memory, disk, network, process, and temperature collectors without per-item normal-path log spam.

tasks.title: Document and version
tasks.description: Update docs for overview grouping and live agent collector logging, bump module version, and add changelog entries.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records dashboard and logging changes.
docs/dashboard.md and docs/logging.md describe the new behavior.
tasks.implementation_notes: Bumped MODULE.bazel to 0.2.23 and documented Overview grouping, live log flushing, collector diagnostics, and the correct TheWatcherAgent.log path.

nodes.label: Make agent logging visible while running

edges.label: Collector logs depend on visible file flushing
